schema.description: End-to-end healer for a flaky Playwright test: diagnose (trace/logs/recipes), apply a fix strategy to a copy of the repo inside an isolated sandbox, validate by burn-in (reproduce M runs, then require N/N green post-patch), and either return the diff (mode=suggest) or open a PR through the host's approval pipeline (mode=pr). Successful heals are persisted as reusable recipes.
schema.name: heal_flaky_test

build_id.description: Optional GitHub Actions run id to pull failure logs from.

mode.description: suggest (default): return diff + report only. pr: branch, commit, push and open a PR via the host's approval pipeline.

repo_dir.description: Path to the local checkout whose Playwright project root contains playwright.config.*.

strategy.description: Optional override of the automatically selected fix strategy.

test_id.description: Spec path relative to repo_dir, e.g. 'tests/login.spec.ts'.

trace_path.description: Optional path to a failing trace.zip for this test.
